provisions.title: Short title and commencement
provisions.content: (1) This Act may be cited as the Mineral Royalty (Repeal) Act, 1997, and shall come into operation on 1st April, 1997.

provisions.title: Repeal of Cap. 215
provisions.content: The Mineral Royalty Act is hereby repealed. Contact us Visit our Facebook Page Visit our Twitter/X profile About ZambiaLII ZambiaLII is a pioneer in the free access to law movement and serves as a reliable and timely source of judicial decisions, legislation and statutory instruments. Since 2012, ZambiaLII has been hosted by the Southern African Institute for Policy and Research (SAIPAR) , an independent, educational and development-oriented research centre.
